channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Israeli air attack destroys buildings around south Lebanon hospital
item.description: Israeli strikes in the vicinity of a hospital in southern Lebanon destroyed buildings and several emergency vehicles.

item.title: Fire at key Australian refinery deepens fuel risks amid Iran war shortages
item.description: A major fire at a key refinery in Australia refinery has disrupted fuel production, raising fears of fuel shortages.

item.title: Why many Kashmiris are donating gold, breaking piggy banks for Iran
item.description: A centuries-old historical bond has come alive again amid the war on Iran, with Kashmiris sharing whatever they can.

item.title: US military kills three in new Eastern Pacific boat strike
item.description: The attack is the latest in a string of killings by the United States that rights groups say are 'unlawful'.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 48 of the US-Iran conflict?
item.description: US–Iran talks gain pace as Pakistan mediates, optimism for a new round of talks in Islamabad.

item.title: Israel’s military kills four Lebanese paramedics in consecutive strikes
item.description: An Israeli triple-tap attack on rescue workers in southern Lebanon has killed four and left several others injured.

item.title: Hopes grow for a breakthrough in US-Iran talks as Pakistan mediates
item.description: Pakistani sources say there has been a 'major breakthrough' over a deal on Iran’s nuclear programme.

item.title: Democrats clash with US Energy Secretary over Iran war and gas prices
item.description: Watch the moment a Democratic congresswoman tells the US Energy Secretary he is ‘living in a different world’.

item.title: Pakistan expecting ‘major breakthrough’ tied to Iran’s nuclear programme
item.description: A source has told Al Jazeera that Pakistan is expecting a breakthrough tied to Iran’s nuclear programme.

item.title: Russian attacks on Ukraine kill 16 people, including a child
item.description: Deadly strikes hit Kyiv, Odesa, and Dnipro, while Russia says two children killed in Ukrainian attacks.
